reviews.review_description: I saw this game on my recommended and decided to download it because it looked interesting. The menu system is really annoying to use especially the way I hold my controller (I hold all buttons at one just for extra grip because my controllers are half broken) the shop didn’t really have good cosmetics. The music was cool and chill I love the quest cam and green screen areas.
